title: Electronic device including display
abstract: An electronic device is disclosed, including: a printed circuit board, a first support member including a first surface and a second surface opposite to the first surface, the first support member defining a first hole formed through the first surface and the second surface, wherein the printed circuit board is coupled to the second surface, and a display coupled to the first surface of the first support member, the display defining: a second hole on a first side of the display to correspond to at least a portion of the first hole, and a third hole on a second side of the display opposite the first side, the third hole adjacent to the second hole and corresponding to the remaining portion of the first hole, wherein signal lines related to driving pixels of the display are disposed in an area between the second hole and the third hole, and wherein at least a partial area of the display is set as an active area configured to display a screen.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) An electronic device, comprising: a printed circuit board; a first support member including a first surface and a second surface opposite to the first surface, the first support member defining a first hole formed through the first surface and the second surface, wherein the printed circuit board is coupled to the second surface; and a display coupled to the first surface of the first support member, the display defining: a second hole on a first side of the display to correspond to a portion of the first hole, and a third hole on a second side of the display opposite the first side, the third hole adjacent to the second hole and corresponding to another portion of the first hole, wherein signal lines related to driving pixels of the display are disposed in an area between the second hole and the third hole, and wherein at least a partial area of the display is set as an active area configured to display a screen. The electronic device of claim 1, wherein the printed circuit board includes a sensor structure including a sensor module and a first camera module and a second camera module, wherein the first camera module is disposed proximate to the second camera module, and at least a portion of the sensor module is interposed between the first and second camera modules, wherein the first camera module passes through one side of the first hole and is disposed in the second hole, and wherein the second camera module passes through an opposite side of the first hole and is disposed in the third hole. The electronic device of claim 2, wherein the sensor module is disposed under the display. The electronic device of claim 2, wherein the signal lines are separated from one another at regular intervals, and wherein the sensor module is disposed between the signal lines within the regular intervals. The electronic device of claim 2, wherein another area of the display different from the partial area is set as an inactive area, the inactive area set at least between the second hole and the third hole. The electronic device of claim 5, wherein the inactive area of the display is configured to include a light transmittance rate greater than a light transmittance rate of the active area of the display by a prespecified light transmittance magnitude. The electronic device of claim 5, wherein at least one of a light emitting part of the sensor module and a light receiving part of the sensor module is disposed under the inactive area. The electronic device of claim 2, wherein the first hole further defines an extension recess corresponding to a position of the sensor module. The electronic device of claim 2, wherein the second camera module further includes a transmitter and a receiver, and wherein at least a part of the transmitter and the receiver is disposed within the third hole. The electronic device of claim 2, further comprising: a block structure into which at least a portion of the sensor structure is inserted. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the block structure passes through the first hole, such that the first camera module and the second camera module are disposed in the second hole and the third hole. The electronic device of claim 10, wherein the block structure defines at least one through-hole into which at least one of the first camera module, the second camera module, and the sensor module is inserted. The electronic device of claim 12, wherein the block structure includes an adhesive member coupled to a front surface of the block structure and surrounding at least a portion of the at least one through-hole, wherein the front surface of the block structure corresponds to the first surface of the first support member. The electronic device of claim 13, wherein the at least one through-hole defines a first through-hole, a second through-hole, and a third through-hole, wherein the adhesive member is attached to a rear surface of the display while surrounding at least a part of the second through-hole and the third through-hole, and wherein the rear surface of the display corresponds to the second surface of the first support member. The electronic device of claim 2, further comprising: a front plate coupled to a front surface of the display, the front plate covering at least the first camera module, the second camera module, and the sensor module.
